# UC-12.7.4 · Argo CD API RBAC Violation Attempts — Unauthorized Sync and Delete

## Description

Repeated denied sync or delete attempts often precede insider misuse, stolen tokens, or automation using the wrong service account. Centralizing Argo CD API denials gives security teams a high-fidelity signal without waiting for Kubernetes audit noise.

## Value

Supports least-privilege enforcement and proves detective control coverage for GitOps platforms under SOC2 or internal SRE policy.

## Implementation

Confirm API server logs include authenticated user or OIDC subject and source IP. Add allowlists for known CI service accounts. Forward to a security index with stricter retention; pair with SOAR for automatic ticket creation on novel user+app pairs.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:server"
| search "403" OR "Forbidden" OR "permission denied" OR "not allowed" OR "RBAC"
| rex field=_raw "(?i)(?P<verb>sync|delete|update|patch|create).*application\\s+(?P<app>[^\\s]+)"
| stats count, values(user) as users, values(remote_ip) as src_ips by app, verb
| where count >= 5
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (denials by user), heatmap (user × application), timeline with drilldown to raw log lines.

## References

- [Argo CD — RBAC](https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/rbac/)
